_comment: Compute cost peg — €/Mtoken, separate input/output, keyed by model id. This is CONFIG, not code: the operator edits it as providers/hardware change. It is the cost-discovered, honest peg the compute-register claim depends on. Local (ollama) rates are the amortized self-hosted cost from the 2026-05-21 sovereign-compute benchmark (consumer tier ~€27-31/mo); refine as real throughput is measured against the meter. Cloud rates track the BYOK provider's published price the operator actually pays. A model absent here meters at rate 0 and is flagged estimated=true so uncosted usage stays visible. Never put provider API keys in this file.
